description_long: This handbag features a woven basket-style body made from light-colored natural fibers, creating a checkered pattern of beige and off-white tones. The bag is structured with a rounded, slightly bulbous silhouette and a flat base for stability. Two short, circular handles made of polished wood are attached to the top, secured with decorative fabric loops in a black-and-white houndstooth pattern. The opening of the bag is wide, suggesting easy access to the interior, which is likely unlined or minimally lined. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for casual urban outings or trips to the market. The combination of natural materials and bold handle accents gives the bag a contemporary yet artisanal appearance.
description: A woven, basket-style handbag with light natural fibers, circular wooden handles, and decorative houndstooth fabric loops. The bag is structured, spacious, and visually striking with its checkered pattern.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded, bulbous profile and the thickness of the woven body, with the wooden handles visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full checkered woven pattern, both circular wooden handles, and the decorative houndstooth fabric loops.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, highlighting the curved silhouette and the attachment of the handles.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the woven pattern and handle arrangement, but with less emphasis on the decorative loops.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rigid circular wooden handles attached with fabric loops; not adjustable; designed for hand carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open top with no visible closure mechanism; access is unrestricted.
attribute_decorative_elements: Decorative black-and-white houndstooth fabric loops securing the handles.
attribute_pattern: Checkered woven pattern with alternating beige and off-white squares.
